Definition: The initial number of animals that serve as a starting point for the population generation simulation
The number of days to simulate for the population generation simulation
Number of Calves (head) -- The initial number of pre-weaned calves
Number of HeiferI animals (head) -- The initial number of heifers that are weaned but not yet bred
Number of HeiferII animals (head) -- The initial number of heifers that are either eligible for breeding (based on user-inputted Breeding Start Day for heifers), or in early pregnancy
Number of HeiferIII animals (head) -- The initial number of close-up heifers (within the user-defined close-up period, e.g., Prefresh Day)
Number of Cows (head) -- The initial number of dry and lactating cows
replacements (head) -- Number of replacement animals available in the replacement market
Fraction of cows that are lactating. Used during herd initialization
Fractions of the milking animal population that are parity 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5+. The sum must equal 1.0
